utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 required items, each with full details: property (address, type, price, features), financing (down payment, mortgage, term, payment), legal_services (provider, services, cost), moving_services (scope, cost, notes), setup_services (utility breakdown and total setup cost), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All are fully specified. There is also an extra item 'emergency_contact', but that does not affect the coverage count since it is not part of the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property at 124 Brighton Avenue, Toronto ON M4M 1P5, which is a semi‑detached house priced at CAD 825,000. This fits within the persona’s purchase budget range (700K–850K). Among the ground‑truth purchase options, the property most closely matching a 3‑bed, 140 m² family‑oriented house with workshop, home office, and garden is the 'Family House' (rated 10). For financing, the AI assistant proposed a conventional mortgage with 25‑year amortization and 5‑year fixed term, which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' (rated 9) in the ground truth. The legal services were described as a standard real‑estate lawyer providing title search and purchase‑review, matching the 'Basic Legal Package' (rated 8). The moving service was a local Toronto move, 2–3 bedroom scope, cost ≈ CAD 2000—closest to 'Standard Moving' (rated 8). The utilities setup was basic (hydro, gas, internet, water) totaling CAD 370, aligning with 'Basic Utilities' (rated 5).
